description_long: This is a traditional wooden chair with a rich brown finish, featuring a solid rectangular seat and four turned legs for stability. The backrest is slightly curved and supported by three vertical spindles on each side, with a decorative central splat that adds a touch of classic craftsmanship. The legs and back spindles are rounded and carved, giving the chair an elegant, vintage appearance. The seat is flat and plain, designed for comfort and everyday use. There are no armrests, making the chair compact and versatile for various settings. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for both dining and casual seating in urban environments.
description: A classic wooden chair with a curved backrest, decorative splat, and four turned legs, finished in a rich brown color.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the curved backrest, decorative splat, and flat seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat and the profile of the backrest and spindles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the arrangement of the spindles.
description_view_3: Opposite three-quarter view showing the seat, front legs, and side profile of the backrest.
